page_metadata.biotools__summary: Protein and nucleotide sequence repeat identification and masking. Screens query sequences against a reference collection of repeats and "censors" (masks) homologous portions with masking symbols, as well as generating a report classifying all found repeats.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Protein and nucleotide sequence repeat identification and masking. Screens query sequences against a reference collection of repeats and "censors" (masks) homologous portions with masking symbols, as well as generating a report classifying all found repeats.
